## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] If this touches a published package, I ran `pnpm changeset` and committed the changeset.
- [ ] No private keys, raw PRF output, or decrypted signing material is sent to, logged by, or persisted on any backend.
- [ ] No secrets are logged or printed from the browser/native side.
- [ ] Tests added or updated; `pnpm build` and `pnpm test` pass locally.
- [ ] Source/docs are ASCII only (no em-dashes, no curly quotes).
